name: Honey-Nut Peanut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine the sugars, peanut butter, and butter; beat until light and fluffy. Add eggs and blend well.
2. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off. Gradually add flour and baking soda, mixing well. Stir in chopped peanuts. Drop dough by heaping tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
3. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
